default.text: It can help develop your strengths gradually.

encourage_exploration.text: Exploring different styles can help you build stronger foundations.

steady_growth.text: Steady progress can help strengthen your consistency.

reinforce_strength.text: Reinforcing what you already do well can improve stability.

controlled_expansion.text: Expanding gradually can help maintain stability.

optimization_focus.text: Small adjustments can further refine your performance.
